## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (includes the contract + generation evals)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run gen:schema -- --check` is clean (regenerated if an artifact shape changed)
- [ ] Added/updated fixtures + tests for new validator rules or behavior
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under **Unreleased** for user-facing changes
- [ ] No new runtime dependency added to a core package (provider SDKs stay optional)
- [ ] No internal planning notes committed (`PLAN.md` stays git-ignored)

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots, etc. -->
